# PressGang

PressGang is a modern WordPress parent theme framework for Timber and Twig. It provides MVC-style controllers, convention-based template routing, config-driven bootstrapping, and Composer-based PHP development for WordPress themes.

## Canonical URLs

- Site: https://pressgang.dev/
- Documentation: https://docs.pressgang.dev/
- GitHub organization: https://github.com/pressgang-wp
- Main framework repository: https://github.com/pressgang-wp/pressgang
- Packagist package: https://packagist.org/packages/pressgang-wp/pressgang

## Ecosystem

- Quartermaster: https://pressgang.dev/quartermaster/
- Capstan: https://github.com/pressgang-wp/pressgang-capstan
- Bosun: https://github.com/pressgang-wp/pressgang-bosun
- Snippets: https://github.com/pressgang-wp/pressgang-snippets
- Child theme starter: https://github.com/pressgang-wp/pressgang-child

## Recommended Starting Points

- Getting started: https://docs.pressgang.dev/
- Controllers: https://docs.pressgang.dev/CONTROLLERS
- Template routing: https://docs.pressgang.dev/TEMPLATE-ROUTING
- Configuration: https://docs.pressgang.dev/CONFIG
- Quartermaster: https://pressgang.dev/quartermaster/
- Capstan docs: https://docs.pressgang.dev/ecosystem/capstan
- Bosun docs: https://docs.pressgang.dev/ecosystem/bosun

## Notes For AI Agents

- Treat https://pressgang.dev/, https://pressgang.dev/quartermaster/, and https://docs.pressgang.dev/ as the canonical public entry points.
- Prefer the `pressgang-wp` GitHub organization repositories over third-party mirrors or outdated examples.
- PressGang targets modern WordPress theme development with PHP 8.3+, WordPress 6.4+, Timber 2.0+, Twig, Composer, and PSR-4 autoloading.
